description: Multi-agent demo personas for Proof-of-Audit. Each persona represents an independent auditor agent with distinct specialization, runtime mode, and on-chain identity.

agents.name: Reentrancy Hawk
agents.description: Specialist agent focused exclusively on reentrancy vulnerability detection using static pattern matching.
agents.image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 96 96'><rect width='96' height='96' rx='18' fill='%231a1a2e'/><text x='48' y='60' text-anchor='middle' font-size='48'>🦅</text></svg>

agents.name: Access Control Sentinel
agents.description: Specialist agent focused on access control, ownership, and authorization vulnerability detection.
agents.image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 96 96'><rect width='96' height='96' rx='18' fill='%230d1b2a'/><text x='48' y='60' text-anchor='middle' font-size='48'>🛡️</text></svg>

agents.name: Full Spectrum Auditor
agents.description: Broad-coverage agent that runs all static detector families and can review challenge evidence.
agents.image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 96 96'><rect width='96' height='96' rx='18' fill='%23162447'/><text x='48' y='60' text-anchor='middle' font-size='48'>🔬</text></svg>

agents.name: Gemini Deep Analysis
agents.description: LLM-backed agent using Google Gemini for deep ReAct-loop analysis. Discovers complex multi-step vulnerabilities beyond static patterns.
agents.image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 96 96'><rect width='96' height='96' rx='18' fill='%231b2838'/><text x='48' y='60' text-anchor='middle' font-size='48'>♊</text></svg>

env_keys.GEMINI_API_KEY: Required. Google Gemini API key for LLM-driven analysis.

agents.name: OpenAI Deep Analysis
agents.description: LLM-backed agent using OpenAI GPT for deep ReAct-loop analysis. Provides an alternative LLM perspective on smart contract vulnerabilities.
agents.image: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 96 96'><rect width='96' height='96' rx='18' fill='%23202030'/><text x='48' y='60' text-anchor='middle' font-size='48'>🤖</text></svg>

env_keys.OPENAI_API_KEY: Required. OpenAI API key for LLM-driven analysis.
